title: Molten Middle Eastern Runner Bean Curry
description: A pungent and flavorful curry featuring runner beans in a rich lacquer glaze, cooked to perfection in a tandoor clay pot. This macrobiotic friendly dish is perfect for a monsoon evening.

ingredients.name: runner beans
ingredients.notes: trimmed and cut into 1 inch pieces

instructions: Heat oil in the tandoor clay pot over medium heat.
Add cumin seeds and let them sizzle for a few seconds.
Add chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for another minute.
Add the trimmed runner beans and cook for 5 minutes.
Add coriander powder, turmeric powder, and red chili powder and stir well.
Pour in the coconut milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the curry cook for 20 minutes.
Stir in the lacquer glaze and season with salt to taste.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and serve hot.
